title: Hostile Country
writer: Ron Ormond, Maurice Tombragel, Forbes Parkhill
actors: James Ellison, Russell Hayden, Raymond Hatton
plot: The first of a series of six westerns produced by Ron Ormond for Lippert distribution starring two ex-Hopalong Cassidy sidekicks, which means it also is the first one in the series that was a direct swipe from one of A. H. Hackel'...
